response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in software development and some exposure to AI and fintech, but lacks direct experience in agentic AI architecture and senior technical leadership at scale-ups.
strengths: Experience with multiple programming languages and technologies
Strong open-source contributions and personal projects
concerns: Lack of direct experience in agentic AI and multi-agent systems
Not enough experience in senior technical leadership roles
Limited experience in regulated or high-stakes commercial environments

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct experience in agentic AI
